About Idaho Custom Bath

12+ years serving Boise and surrounding areas

Idaho Custom Bath started a decade ago with a simple goal: to provide homeowners in the Boise area with high-quality remodeling services they could rely on. We saw a need for contractors committed to doing the job right, the first time.

Our approach is simple: listen to our clients, understand their vision, and execute with precision. We believe in open communication, transparent pricing, and a commitment to exceeding expectations on every project.

We're proud to be a part of the Boise community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local businesses, and strive to contribute to the beauty and value of our neighborhoods.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Idaho Custom Bath

Trusted home remodeler professionals serving Boise, ID and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
